body_txt: One of the nastier ways to kill a character that tends to show up in a lot of Slasher Movies . Quite simply, the killer takes a knife or other blade (or if the killer is a monster, its claws will do quite nicely) and slashes the victim's belly open (often from groin to sternum), usually resulting in the poor unfortunate's insides spilling out. If the gutting is self-inflicted and a matter of honor, see Seppuku . Related to Half the Man He Used to Be . If the victim is pregnant, a Traumatic C-Section may occur. This may lead to an Obligatory Joke along the lines of "I always knew you had guts!"
